titleStmt.title: SII 7.944: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 944. (A.R. No. 315 of 1902). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SABHA IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmaṉṉu patumam pūtta veḻulakun tāmuṉcey tavattāl parutivaḻit toṉṟi mutalāka Ampoṉ malarkkoṭi cempiyankiḻānaṭi Orumaruṅ kuṭaṉamarn tiruppac cempoṉ vīrasiṁ hāsa ṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājake
muṭivākavuḷḷa śrīmeykkīrttiyuṭaiya tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭuThe word yāṇṭu is expressed by a symbol. 15vatu Iṣapanāyaṟṟup patināṟān ti(y)etiyāṉa nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai nāḷ rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭit tiruveṇṇainallūrnāṭṭup brahma teya
nallūr Uṭaiyār Āṭkoṇṭatevar koyilil māṭāpattiyañ ceyta Uṭaiyār Akamuṭaiyāḷ poṉnāṇṭāḷen nilavilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvuṭaiyār Āṭkoṇṭatevar koyilile kaṭamaipaṭṭu nilainillāte Oṭippoṉa
puṇaippaṭṭa kaviṉit tevarkaḷtevapaṭṭaṉum pārkuḷattut tillaimuvāyiranampiyum Ivviruvaraiyu meṉakku mutukaṇṇākak koṇṭu Ittevar tittakkuḷamāṉa tevaṉārkeṇiyiṉ kiḻkaraiyil Eḻun=ta ruḷiyiruntu pūcai koṇṭaruḷukiṟa Āḷu
mutupaṭikkun tirukkaikoṭṭippuṟattukkumākavum nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr śrīvāṉavaṉvatikku meṟku mummuṭicoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟup peruvaḻikku meṟkuk kaḷḷiviḷākameṉṟu peruṭaiya
laimuvāyiranampi Uḷḷiṭṭārpakkal Ivvuṭaiyār vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam �-m Itan teṟku perumpāṇṭur kaṟṟuṟaisahasra n Uḷḷiṭṭārpakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam �-m Ivvatikkuk kiḻakku Ivvāykkā
lukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ caturattu Ittevar tevatānam poṉmeyn=ta coḻanallūr Ellaikku kiḻakku ṉellivāykkālukku teṟku kavini kaṟṟuṟai ṭuṭaiya nilam 2- m Āka nilam 3� Inni
lam muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyiṉāl nilam Oṉṟe Araimā varaikkāṇik kiḻaraiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmi licainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟ ya kiḻic celavaṟak koṇṭu Āṭkoṇ
ṭatevar śrīpaṇṭārattile Ikkaṭamaik kuṭalāka Oṭukkiṉeṉ Ittevarkaḷtevapaṭṭaṉaiyum Ittillaimuvāyiranampiyaiyum mutukaṇṇākavu lam Oṉṟe Araimā varaikkāṇik
kiḻaraikkuñ cilliṟai peruvari Eccoṟu Āḷamañci Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭimai Eppeṟpaṭṭitum Oṉṟuṅ koḷḷakkaṭavo mallātomāka Ipparicu cantirātittavaṟ ce k kuṭuttom Ittiruveṇṇainallūr
sabh Aiyom ..itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 7.944 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
